title: Add Image to Form
excerpt: I would love to be able to add a different image or header to the top of my monday forms, rather than being limited to my monday account branding. I often create custom images or need to use forms that are specific to my…

posts.author: GovConHacks (Ashley Duwel)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to be able to add a different image or header to the top of my monday forms, rather than being limited to my monday account branding. I often create custom images or need to use forms that are specific to my clients that are going out unbranded. There is a paid application that I’m aware of but the cost seems like overkill for this one particular feature.
